message:
refactor(wasm): extract writer and reader modules

Complete WASM modularization by extracting lance_writer.zig and
fragment_reader.zig from wasm.zig.

Phase 5 extractions:
- lance_writer.zig: Low-level writer API + high-level fragment writer
- fragment_reader.zig: Fragment reader with typed column access

Final results:
- wasm.zig reduced from 4,494 to 705 lines (-84%)
- 11 focused modules in src/wasm/
- WASM binary size unchanged at 188KB
- All 24 tests pass
